CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ALYCE KIMERLING AS COUNSEL. DEF. LINDA CONELIUS WAS PRESENT & DEF. JACKIE WEBB WAS NOT PRESENT, BUT GAVE HER DAUGHTER, MS. CORNELIUS, THE AUTHORITY TO ENTER INTO A STIPULATION. CASE SETTLED BY STIP. JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 33 HAR- BOR RD - $2,360 RENT & DAMAGES - FORFEITURE OF LEASE - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 9-7-93 AT 12 NOON - DEF. WARRANTS THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULT OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES - NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE GRANTED. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORNELIUS, LINDA WEBB, JACKIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 33 HARBOR ROAD, S.F. $2,360.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,360.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-07-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED THROUGH 12:00 NOON SEPT 7, 1993. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
